task: move metal pot to right lower corner
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A metal pot sits on a wooden countertop. A red-handled tool is to the right of the pot, and a green bottle is on a dark cloth further right. The pot is a rigid container with a handle and rim. STRATEGY - Reach the pot, grasp its handle for stability, transport it to the right lower corner, and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the pot or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pot body; Step 2 grasp the handle for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the right lower corner; Step 4 place on the target area.

Goal: on(metal_pot, right_lower_corner); stable(metal_pot)
Scene: metal_pot, right_lower_corner, countertop
Step 1: reach(metal_pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the metal pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, metal_pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, metal_pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(metal_pot)
  affordance_region: the handle of the metal pot
  contact: holding(metal_pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(metal_pot)
Step 3: transport(metal_pot -> right_lower_corner)
  affordance_region: the right lower corner area
  spatial: above(metal_pot, right_lower_corner, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(metal_pot)
  done_when: above(metal_pot, right_lower_corner, 0.05)
Step 4: place(metal_pot -> right_lower_corner)
  affordance_region: the right lower corner area
  contact: surface_contact(metal_pot, right_lower_corner) [completion]; released(metal_pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(metal_pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(metal_pot, right_lower_corner) AND released(metal_pot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the metal pot
the handle of the metal pot
